full_text:
Li Xi (Jihe)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Xi, styledJihe, was born in Tongdi in Shangdang (Modern-day Qinxian in Shanxi). An able and virtuous man, noted for diligence when finally came into office. Li Xi was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
